caption: A news broadcast features a scene of several men in formal suits and traditional Indian attire gathered closely together, surrounded by microphones. A central figure, identified by on-screen text as "नीतीश कुमार, CM, बिहार", is seen speaking into a white microphone. He wears a dark jacket over a light-colored shirt and glasses. To his side, other men listen or observe, including one in a dark suit and tie. The screen is heavily overlaid with news graphics from "NEWS 18 इंडिया". Red banners at the bottom state, "PM ने बिहार के दोनों डिप्टी CM को बधाई दी", while a top banner asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Small portrait photos of other officials, such as "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार", appear on the right side. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and the graphics transition, with a side panel identifying "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" appearing on the left.
